.angl{border-right:.049em solid;border-top:.049em solid;box-sizing:border-box;margin-right:.03889em}.katex .anglpad{padding:0 .03889em}.katex .eqn-num:before{content:"(" counter(katexEqnNo) ")";counter-increment:katexEqnNo}.katex .mml-eqn-num:before{content:"(" counter(mmlEqnNo) ")";counter-increment:mmlEqnNo}.katex .mtr-glue{width:50%}.katex .cd-vert-arrow{display:inline-block;position:relative}.katex .cd-label-left{display:inline-block;position:absolute;right:calc(50% + .3em);text-align:left}.katex .cd-label-right{display:inline-block;left:calc(50% + .3em);position:absolute;text-align:right}.katex-display{display:block;margin:1em 0;text-align:center}.katex-display>.katex{display:block;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap}.katex-display>.katex>.katex-html{display:block;position:relative}.katex-display>.katex>.katex-html>.tag{position:absolute;right:0}.katex-display.leqno>.katex>.katex-html>.tag{left:0;right:auto}.katex-display.fleqn>.katex{padding-left:2em;text-align:left}body{counter-reset:katexEqnNo mmlEqnNo}.ns-conversation{max-width:100%}.ns-message-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}.ns-message-row.ns-user{justify-content:flex-end}.ns-message-row.ns-ai{justify-content:flex-start}.ns-avatar{width:34px;min-height:34px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;user-select:none;flex:0 0 auto}.ns-avatar img{width:34px;height:34px;object-fit:cover;display:block;border-radius:999px}.ns-avatar-name{font-size:10px;color:var(--ns-muted,#64748b);text-align:center;line-height:1.2;margin-top:2px;max-width:100%;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.ns-side-slot{min-width:34px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;flex:0 0 auto;padding-top:4px}.ns-msg-link{font-size:11px;color:var(--ns-muted,#64748b);text-decoration:none;border:1px solid var(--ns-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:999px;padding:2px .ns-bubble{background:#f0f9ff;border:1px solid #bae6fd;border-top:none}.ns-message-row.ns-ai .ns-bubble{background:#ffffff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-top:none}.ns-bubble-wrap.ns-no-bubble-header .ns-bubble{border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0}:root{--ns-bg:#f8fafc;--ns-card:#ffffff;--ns-border:#e2e8f0;--ns-text:#1e293b;--ns-muted:#64748b;--ns-link:#2563eb;--ns-heading:#0f172a;--ns-sub-heading:#1f2937;--ns-code-bg:#f1f5f9;--ns-font-size:14px;--ns-accent:#4E6EF2;--ns-accent2:#4e6ef2;--ns-accent-glow:rgba(78,110,242,0.25);--ns-top-bg:rgba(255,255,255,.85)}html,body{height:100%;margin:0}body{font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,"Noto Sans CJK SC","Microsoft YaHei",sans-serif;background:var(--ns-bg);color:var(--ns-text);font-size:var(--ns-font-size);line-height:1.72;padding:0 16px}.ns-wrap{max-width:980px;width:100%;margin:0 auto;min-height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.ns-top{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--ns-top-bg),rgba(255,255,255,0));backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--ns-border)}.ns-top.ns-top-no-meta{border-bottom:none}.ns-top-inner{padding:12px 16px 10px var(--ns-border);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ns-muted);flex-shrink:0;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s ease}a.ns-brand-pill:hover{background:var(--ns-accent);border-color:var(--ns-accent);color:#fff}a.ns-brand-pill:hover .ns-brand-text{color:#fff}a.ns-brand-pill:hover .ns-brand-sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)}a.ns-brand-pill:hover .ns-brand-dot{background:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}.ns-title tr:hover{background:rgba(0,0,0,.05)}.ns-bubble img{border-radius:12px;display:block;margin:14px 0;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.12)}.ns-bubble figure{text-align:center}.ns-bubble figure img{margin:0 auto;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}.ns-bubble figcaption{font-size:12px;color:var(--ns-muted);margin-top:12px;font-style:italic;line-height:1.5}.ns-bubble .image-gallery{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:12px;margin:16px 0}.ns-bubble .image-gallery img{margin:0;width:100%;height:200px;object-fit:cover}.ns-bubble br{margin:0 !important;padding:0 !important}.ns-bubble .horizontal-scroll-wrapper,.ns-bubble .table-block,.ns-bubble .table-block-component,.ns-bubble .table-content,.ns-bubble table-block,.ns-bubble table-block-component,.ns-bubble table-content{max-width:100%;overflow-x:auto;display:block;white-space:normal}.ns-bubble blockquote{border-left:none !important;border-radius:0 !important;background:none !important;background-color:transparent !important;background-image:none !important;font-style:italic;position:relative;padding:14px 20px;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word}.ns-bubble blockquote:before{content:none !important}.ns-bubble blockquote p{padding-left:12px;white-space:pre-wrap}.ns-bubble blockquote.warning,.ns-bubble blockquote.info,.ns-bubble blockquote.success,.ns-bubble blockquote.error{border-left:none !important;border-radius:0 !important;background:none !important;background-color:transparent !important;background-image:none !important}.ns-bubble a[href^="http"]:after{content:'↗';font-size:0.7em;margin-left:2px;opacity:.6}.ns-bubble .citation,.ns-bubble [data-citation]{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:18px;height:18px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;background:var(--ns-accent);color:white;border-radius:50%;margin:0 2px;vertical-align:super;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s ease}.ns-bubble .citation:hover{transform:scale(1.1)}.ns-bubble a.citation,.ns-bubble a.source-link{font-size:11px;color:var(--ns-muted);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f5f9,rgba(0,0,0,.04));padding:4px 10px;border-radius:10px;margin:0 4px;text-decoration:none;border:1px solid var(--ns-border);transition:all .18s ease;font-weight:600;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}.ns-bubble a.citation:hover,.ns-bubble a.source-link:hover{background:var(--ns-accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--ns-accent);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}.ns-bubble a.citation:after,.ns-bubble a.source-link:after{content:none}.ns-bubble .attachment{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid var(--ns-border);background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.85),rgba(255,255,255,.6));border-radius:12px;padding:8px 12px;margin:8px 0;max-width:100%}.ns-bubble .attachment-icon{font-size:14px;opacity:.9}.ns-bubble .attachment-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.ns-bubble .sources{margin:14px 0 2px 0;border:1px dashed var(--ns-border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 12px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.02)}.ns-bubble .sources-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ns-muted);margin-bottom:8px}.ns-bubble .sources ul{margin:0;padding-left:18px;list-style-type:disc}.ns-bubble .sources li{margin:4px 0}.ns-bubble .sources a{font-size:12px;text-decoration:none;color:var(--ns-accent)}.ns-bubble .think,.ns-bubble .thinking-block,.ns-bubble .ds-think-content,.ns-bubble [data-thinking="true"],.ns-bubble details[data-thinking="true"]{margin:10px 0;border:1px dashed var(--ns-border);border-left:3px solid [data-platform="doubao"]{--doubao-bg:#17171a;--doubao-surface:#232324;--doubao-text:#f5f5f5;--doubao-text-secondary:#a3a3a3;--doubao-border:#3a3a3c;--doubao-code-bg:#1e1e20;--doubao-code-text:#e5e5e5;--doubao-thinking-bg:rgba(78,110,242,0.08)}.ns-nav-btn{position:fixed;right:30px;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--ns-accent),var(--ns-accent2));color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,.2);opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:translateY(20px);transition:all .3s ease;z-index:999}.ns-nav-btn svg{width:20px;height:20px}.ns-nav-btn.visible{opacity:1 rgba(0,0,0,.3)}.ns-nav-btn.visible:active{transform:translateY(0) !important}.ns-nav-top{bottom:138px}.ns-nav-collapse{bottom:84px}.ns-nav-bottom{bottom:30px}@media print{.ns-nav-btn{display:none !important}}</style>
  <script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    
    try {
        var topBtn = document.getElementById('ns-back-to-top');
        var bottomBtn = document.getElementById('ns-scroll-to-bottom');
        if (!topBtn && !bottomBtn) return;

        var docH = function() { return Math.max(document.body.scrollHeight, document.documentElement.scrollHeight); };
        var viewH = function() { return window.innerHeight; };
        var scrollY = function() { return Math.max(0, window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || 0); };
        var canScroll = function() { return (docH() - viewH()) > 80; };
        var topThreshold = function() { return Math.max(80, Math.min(180, Math.round(viewH() * 0.18))); };
        var bottomGap = function() { return Math.max(24, Math.min(80, Math.round(viewH() * 0.08))); };

        var update = function() {
            var y = scrollY();
            var maxS = Math.max(0, docH() - viewH());
            var ok = canScroll();
            if (topBtn) {
                if (ok && y >= topThreshold()) topBtn.classList.add('visible');
                else topBtn.classList.remove('visible');
            }
            if (bottomBtn) {
                if (ok && y <= maxS - bottomGap()) bottomBtn.classList.add('visible');
                else bottomBtn.classList.remove('visible');
            }
        };

        window.addEventListener('scroll', update, {passive: true});
        window.addEventListener('resize', update);
        window.addEventListener('load', update);
        if (topBtn) topBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { window.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'}); });
        if (bottomBtn) bottomBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { window.scrollTo({top: docH(), behavior: 'smooth'}); });

        try {
            document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(function(img) {
                if (!img.complete) {
                    img.addEventListener('load', update, {once: true});
                    img.addEventListener('error', update, {once: true});
                }
            });
        } catch(e) {}

        update();
        setTimeout(update, 250);
        setTimeout(update, 1000);
    } catch(e) {}

    
    try {
        document.querySelectorAll('pre code').forEach(function(block) {
            if (!block.classList.contains('hljs')) block.classList.add('hljs');
        });
    } catch(e) {}

    try {
        document.querySelectorAll('.ns-bubble pre').forEach(function(pre) {
            if (pre.querySelector('.ns-copy-btn')) return;
            var code = pre.querySelector('code');
            var text = code ? (code.innerText || code.textContent || '') : (pre.innerText || pre.textContent || '');
            text = String(text || '');
            var actions = document.createElement('div');
            actions.className = 'ns-code-actions';
            var btn = document.createElement('button');
            btn.type = 'button';
            btn.className = 'ns-copy-btn';
            btn.textContent = '复制';
            btn.addEventListener('click', async function(ev) {
                ev.preventDefault();
                ev.stopPropagation();
                var ok = false;
                try {
                    if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
                        ok = true;
                    }
                } catch(e) {}
                if (!ok) {
                    try {
                        var ta = document.createElement('textarea');
                        ta.value = text;
                        ta.setAttribute('readonly', 'true');
                        ta.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;left:-9999px;top:0;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;';
                        document.body.appendChild(ta);
                        ta.focus(); ta.select(); ta.setSelectionRange(0, ta.value.length);
                        ok = document.execCommand('copy');
                        ta.remove();
                    } catch(e) {}
                }
                if (ok) {
                    btn.classList.add('ns-copied');
                    var prev = btn.textContent;
                    btn.textContent = '已复制';
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        btn.classList.remove('ns-copied');
                        btn.textContent = prev;
                    }, 1200);
                }
            });
            actions.appendChild(btn);
            pre.appendChild(actions);
        });
    } catch(e) {}

    
    try {
        var collapseBtn = document.getElementById('ns-toggle-collapse');
        if (collapseBtn) {
            var updateCollapseBtn = function() {
                var wrappers = document.querySelectorAll('.ns-collapsible-wrapper');
                if (!wrappers.length) { collapseBtn.style.display = 'none'; return; }
                collapseBtn.style.display = '';
                collapseBtn.classList.add('visible');
                var allCollapsed = true;
                wrappers.forEach(function(w) {
                    if (w.getAttribute('data-collapsed') !== 'true') allCollapsed = false;
                });
                var state = allCollapsed ? 'collapsed' : 'expanded';
                collapseBtn.setAttribute('data-state', state);
                var label = state === 'expanded'
                    ? collapseBtn.getAttribute('data-collapse-label')
                    : collapseBtn.getAttribute('data-expand-label');
                collapseBtn.title = label || '';
            };
            collapseBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                var state = collapseBtn.getAttribute('data-state');
                var newCollapsed = state === 'expanded' ? 'true' : 'false';
                document.querySelectorAll('.ns-collapsible-wrapper').forEach(function(w) {
                    w.setAttribute('data-collapsed', newCollapsed);
                    w.setAttribute('data-nous-collapsed', newCollapsed);
                    var siblingBtn = w.nextElementSibling && w.nextElementSibling.querySelector
                        ? w.nextElementSibling.querySelector('.ns-expand-btn')
                        : null;
                    var btn = siblingBtn || (w.querySelector ? w.querySelector('.ns-expand-btn') : null);
                    if (btn) {
                        var expandText = btn.getAttribute('data-expand-text') || '';
                        var collapseText = btn.getAttribute('data-collapse-text') || '';
                        var textEl = btn.querySelector('.ns-expand-text');
                        btn.setAttribute('data-nous-collapsed', newCollapsed);
                        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', newCollapsed === 'true' ? 'false' : 'true');
                        btn.setAttribute('aria-label', newCollapsed === 'true' ? expandText : collapseText);
                        if (textEl) textEl.textContent = newCollapsed === 'true' ? expandText : collapseText;
                    }
                });
                updateCollapseBtn();
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.ns-expand-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    setTimeout(updateCollapseBtn, 0);
                });
            });
            updateCollapseBtn();
        }
    } catch(e) {}

    
    try {
        window.addEventListener('beforeprint', function() {
            document.body.classList.add('ns-printing');
        });
        window.addEventListener('afterprint', function() {
            document.body.classList.remove('ns-printing');
        });
    } catch(e) {}
});
</script>
</head>

class="ns-preview-text">这类文件是法律推理模型的核心实现，负责证据评估、逻辑推导等核心功能。</p><p class="ns-preview-text">表格</p><p class="ns-preview-text">二、形式化证明相关文件（Lean4）</p><p class="ns-preview-text">这类文件是数学模型形式化证明的载体，目标是消除临时占位的 sorry （未完成证明），完成严格的数学证明。</p><p class="ns-preview-text">表格</p><p class="ns-preview-text">三、验证工具模块</p><p class="ns-preview-text">这类文件负责对模型的逻辑一致性、安全性、等价性进行自动化验证。</p><p class="ns-preview-text">表格</p><p class="ns-preview-text">四、功能扩展模块（产品层）</p><p class="ns-preview-text">这类文件是产品功能扩展的核心，覆盖跨域检查、图相似度、偏离度分析等...</p></div><div class="ns-preview-fade"></div></div><div id="ns-msg-2-collapse-content" class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="oqxx5vv" data-popupid="oqxx5vv"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div></div></div><div class="table-body-JE6MJT"><div class="mdbox-table-root table-container-s7xaQF" data-scroll-inline-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-start="true" data-scroll-inline-start-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-end="true" data-scroll-inline-end-overflow="false"><div class="table-scroll-container-OfUx5s mdbox-table-scroll-container"><div class="container-g0k90b"><table><thead><tr><th>文件名 / 模块路径</th><th>核心功能</th><th>关键问题 / 优化点</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>theory/evidence_evaluation.py</code></td><td>证据评估核心逻辑，包含分词、关键词匹配（如<code>_contains_word_boundary</code>函数）、矛盾检测（<code>detect_contradiction</code>）等</td><td>1. 分词逻辑有盲区：仅按空格分词导致<code>contract_signed</code>中的<code>signed</code>无法匹配；2. 未集成时态推理（<code>temporal_law_engine.py</code>的<code>governing_law_snapshot</code>未被调用）；需决策分词修复方案（原地改 / 新增函数 / 全局预处理）及边界词匹配问题</td></tr><tr><td><code>theory/argumentation_horn_unification.py</code></td><td>基于 Horn 规则的法律论证逻辑推导，如构造 Dung 论辩框架（<code>construct_frame</code>）、前提满足性检查（<code>_premises_satisfied</code>）</td><td>1. 前向推导缺失：仅检查初始事实，未做迭代推导；2. 需处理循环规则、设置推导深度限制；需决策推导逻辑修改方案（改原函数 / 新增方法 / 分层设计）</td></tr><tr><td><code>temporal_law_engine.py</code></td><td>时态法律引擎，提供<code>governing_law_snapshot()</code>（法律快照），处理不同时间节点的法律适用规则</td><td>函数已实现但未被核心模块调用；需决策时态集成方案（改证据结构 / 独立预处理 / 插入 pipeline 中间层），及日期缺失、新旧法冲突的处理规则</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><h3 class="container-KCOKpE">二、形式化证明相关文件（Lean4）</h3></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="container-enLQFx">这类文件是数学模型形式化证明的载体，目标是消除临时占位的<code>sorry</code>（未完成证明），完成严格的数学证明。</div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="table-wrapper-wG0rS7 three-columns-RhonQR"><div class="table-header-qH9Ajf"><div class="title-JhOBP1">表格</div><div class="actions-XLKatx"><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="5i83n5u" data-popupid="5i83n5u"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="2zvinxj" data-popupid="2zvinxj"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="0mq3fbr" data-popupid="0mq3fbr"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div></div></div><div class="table-body-JE6MJT"><div class="mdbox-table-root table-container-s7xaQF" data-scroll-inline-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-start="true" data-scroll-inline-start-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-end="true" data-scroll-inline-end-overflow="false"><div class="table-scroll-container-OfUx5s mdbox-table-scroll-container"><div class="container-g0k90b"><table><thead><tr><th>文件名</th><th>核心内容</th><th>关键决策点</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>BanachEffectiveNodes.lean</code></td><td>巴拿赫有效节点相关证明，包含绝对值、收缩性质等引理</td><td>2 个低难度<code>sorry</code>，优先完成；需调用 Mathlib 现有引理补全</td></tr><tr><td><code>FiniteGaloisAdjunction.lean</code></td><td>有限伽罗瓦伴随相关证明，涉及偏序集、剩余定义、伽罗瓦连接等</td><td>4 个高难度<code>sorry</code>；需决策是否先保留为<code>PENDING_PROOF</code>，优先完成其他文件</td></tr><tr><td><code>FiniteRosetta.lean</code></td><td>有限 Rosetta（多语言 / 多域映射）相关证明，涉及范畴论态射保持</td><td>3 个中难度<code>sorry</code>；需用 CategoryTheory 补全</td></tr><tr><td><code>JC_Formalization.lean</code></td><td>核心形式化证明汇总，包含反例、冲突分析、概率分析等证明项</td><td>需补充 4 个证明项（如<code>Counterexample6_2</code>、<code>InfiniteHornCounterexample</code>）；需决策是声明为<code>axiom</code>还是构造具体证明</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><h3 class="container-KCOKpE">三、验证工具模块</h3></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="container-enLQFx">这类文件负责对模型的逻辑一致性、安全性、等价性进行自动化验证。</div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="table-wrapper-wG0rS7 three-columns-RhonQR"><div class="table-header-qH9Ajf"><div class="title-JhOBP1">表格</div><div class="actions-XLKatx"><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="ugcuqun" data-popupid="ugcuqun"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="g19s5as" data-popupid="g19s5as"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="h4wb8qr" data-popupid="h4wb8qr"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div></div></div><div class="table-body-JE6MJT"><div class="mdbox-table-root table-container-s7xaQF" data-scroll-inline-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-start="true" data-scroll-inline-start-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-end="true" data-scroll-inline-end-overflow="false"><div class="table-scroll-container-OfUx5s mdbox-table-scroll-container"><div class="container-g0k90b"><table><thead><tr><th>文件名 / 模块</th><th>核心功能</th><th>关键决策点</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>verification_engine.py</code>（待新增）</td><td>基于 Z3 定理证明器的验证逻辑</td><td>1. 编码 4 个验证项：π_legal 等价性、LFP 单调性、DP 平滑安全性、约束一致性；2. 需决策字符串编码方式（Z3 字符串理论 /bitvector）、是否用非线性实数算术（NRA）、验证项优先级；3. 需决策文件存放路径（<code>theory/</code>/<code>proofs/</code>/ 新目录<code>verification/</code>）</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><h3 class="container-KCOKpE">四、功能扩展模块（产品层）</h3></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="container-enLQFx">这类文件是产品功能扩展的核心，覆盖跨域检查、图相似度、偏离度分析等。</div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="table-wrapper-wG0rS7 three-columns-RhonQR"><div class="table-header-qH9Ajf"><div class="title-JhOBP1">表格</div><div class="actions-XLKatx"><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="ox4zehq" data-popupid="ox4zehq"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="8t2097q" data-popupid="8t2097q"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="nn7w5hn" data-popupid="nn7w5hn"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div></div></div><div class="table-body-JE6MJT"><div class="mdbox-table-root table-container-s7xaQF" data-scroll-inline-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-start="true" data-scroll-inline-start-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-end="true" data-scroll-inline-end-overflow="false"><div class="table-scroll-container-OfUx5s mdbox-table-scroll-container"><div class="container-g0k90b"><table><thead><tr><th>文件名 / 模块</th><th>核心功能</th><th>关键问题 / 决策点</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>no_functor_finite_checker.py</code>（待新增）</td><td>跨域 obstruction checker（冲突检查器）</td><td>1. 基于 44 条映射数据构造样本；2. 需决策冲突判定标准、输出格式；3. 需决策文件存放路径</td></tr><tr><td><code>graph_similarity_range.py</code></td><td>图相似度量化，用于法律关系图的相似性评估</td><td>现有实现不满足反射性 / 同一性；需决策优化方案（图编辑距离 / 最大公共子图 / Weisfeiler-Leman），平衡精度与效率</td></tr><tr><td><code>judgment_deviation.py</code>（待新增）</td><td>偏离度检查器，计算综合偏离度（<code>D_total = 0.4×D_bayes + 0.35×D_mdl_norm + 0.25×D_aaf_norm</code>）</td><td>需决策权重 / 基准 / 阈值的配置方式，及工具形态（独立 CLI / 集成到 pipeline）</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><h3 class="container-KCOKpE">五、测试 / 基准模块</h3></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="container-enLQFx">这类文件保障系统的稳定性和可验证性。</div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="table-wrapper-wG0rS7 three-columns-RhonQR"><div class="table-header-qH9Ajf"><div class="title-JhOBP1">表格</div><div class="actions-XLKatx"><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="zl4xypm" data-popupid="zl4xypm"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="7t9bu15" data-popupid="7t9bu15"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="y6qf4om" data-popupid="y6qf4om"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div></div></div><div class="table-body-JE6MJT"><div class="mdbox-table-root table-container-s7xaQF" data-scroll-inline-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-start="true" data-scroll-inline-start-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-end="true" data-scroll-inline-end-overflow="false"><div class="table-scroll-container-OfUx5s mdbox-table-scroll-container"><div class="container-g0k90b"><table><thead><tr><th>目录 / 模块</th><th>核心功能</th><th>关键决策点</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>adversarial/</code>（或<code>tests/</code>，待决策）</td><td>对抗测试，覆盖举证责任、证据依赖、时态引擎等 5 个新增模块</td><td>需决策测试目录、用例生成方式（人工 / Hypothesis 自动）、最低测试标准</td></tr><tr><td>Benchmark 用例文件</td><td>系统基准测试，当前 13 个 case，计划扩展到 20+</td><td>需决策扩展数量、expected 值生成方式、域平衡规则</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><h3 class="container-KCOKpE">六、辅助 / 配置文件</h3></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="table-wrapper-wG0rS7 three-columns-RhonQR"><div class="table-header-qH9Ajf"><div class="title-JhOBP1">表格</div><div class="actions-XLKatx"><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="p1z5nld" data-popupid="p1z5nld"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="ri2z5d4" data-popupid="ri2z5d4"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div><div class="action-btn-NhM0gh" aria-describedby="kilfcnp" data-popupid="kilfcnp"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg></div></div></div><div class="table-body-JE6MJT"><div class="mdbox-table-root table-container-s7xaQF" data-scroll-inline-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-start="true" data-scroll-inline-start-overflow="false" data-scroll-inline-at-end="true" data-scroll-inline-end-overflow="false"><div class="table-scroll-container-OfUx5s mdbox-table-scroll-container"><div class="container-g0k90b"><table><thead><tr><th>文件名 / 路径</th><th>核心作用</th><th>决策点</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>requirements.txt</code></td><td>Python 依赖管理</td><td>需决策是否新增<code>scipy</code>/<code>matplotlib</code>/<code>networkx</code>，及 Python 版本兼容范围</td></tr><tr><td>数据文件（<code>counterexample_registry.json</code>/<code>obstruction_analysis.json</code>/<code>reports/mdl_fp/</code>等）</td><td>存储反例、冲突分析、概率分析等数据</td><td>为形式化证明提供数据来源；需基于这些数据构造证明项 / 测试用例</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><h3 class="container-KCOKpE">核心特征总结</h3></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="container-enLQFx">这些代码文件围绕 “法律推理数学模型的形式化证明 + 工程化落地” 两大目标，覆盖：</div></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><ol class="container-RLBpOb">
<li><strong class="container-nB6Z1e">工程层</strong>：修复核心逻辑 Bug、扩展产品功能、保障代码架构合理性；</li>
<li><strong class="container-nB6Z1e">理论层</strong>：完成 Lean4 形式化证明、Z3 自动化验证、数学度量（图相似度 / 偏离度）的严谨性；</li>
<li><strong class="container-nB6Z1e">测试层</strong>：通过对抗测试、基准测试保障系统稳定性和可验证性。</li>
</ol></div><div class="container-fBOrXO"><div class="container-enLQFx">所有文件的决策均需平衡 “数学严谨性” 和 “产品落地效率”（如投入产出比排序中，Bug 修复优先级最高，高难度 Lean 证明优先级相对低）。</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div>
</div><div class="ns-collapse-btn-row"><button type="button" class="ns-expand-btn" data-nous-collapsed="true" data-target-id="ns-msg-2-collapse" aria-controls="ns-msg-2-collapse-content" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="展开" data-expand-text="展开" data-collapse-text="折叠" onclick="(function(btn){var targetId=btn.getAttribute('data-target-id')||'';var w=targetId?document.getElementById(targetId):null;if(!w){var row=btn.closest('.ns-collapse-btn-row');w=row?row.previousElementSibling:btn.closest('.ns-collapsible-wrapper');}if(!w)return;var c=w.getAttribute('data-collapsed')==='true';var next=c?'false':'true';w.setAttribute('data-collapsed',next);w.setAttribute('data-nous-collapsed',next);btn.setAttribute('data-nous-collapsed',next);btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded',c?'true':'false');var textEl=btn.querySelector('.ns-expand-text');if(textEl)textEl.textContent=c?(btn.getAttribute('data-collapse-text')||''):(btn.getAttribute('data-expand-text')||'');btn.setAttribute('aria-label',c?(btn.getAttribute('data-collapse-text')||''):(btn.getAttribute('data-expand-text')||''));})(this)"><span class="ns-expand-icon">▼</span><span class="ns-expand-text">展开</span><span class="ns-expand-meta">~2,760 字 · 10 分钟阅读 <span class="ns-content-indicators">📊</span></span></button>
</div></div></div><div class="ns-side-slot"><a class="ns-msg-link" href="#ns-msg-2">#2</a></div>
